{{Quote|You have performed wonderfully! Lupo could not sell me the gallery fast enough — for a very good price I might add — and left the planet on the first transport with creditors grabbing at his Lekku. Here is a cut of the profits I made off the purchase of this place. They're yours in any case - all this is thanks to you.|Borna Lys to Meetra Surik|<ref name="KOTORII" />}}
'''Borna Lys''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] racer who visited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Borna? Yes, she's been trying to snatch this place out from under me for some time now. Borna! Bornaaaaaa!|Lupo Shar to Meetra Surik|<ref name="KOTORII" />}}
A [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the child of a [[Parent/Legends|father]],<ref name="KOTORII" /> Borna Lys was a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] racer who hung out on<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|269|Lys, Borna}}</ref> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="KOTORII" /> [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] following the [[Battle of Rakata Prime|end]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', which includes the end of the [[Jedi Civil War]] at the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]], to [[3956 BBY]].</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Lys had [[Color/Legends|red]], wrinkled skin and blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="KOTORII" /> She grew frustrated when C9-T9-GE3, who was nearly unbeatable, began appearing at Lupo Shar's swoop-racing track.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Equipment==
Lys wore a silver headdress, tan-colored [[Clothing/Legends|robes]], a brown undershirt, a brown [[Belt/Legends|belt]], tan pants and brown [[Boot/Legends|boots]].<ref name="KOTORII" />

==Behind the scenes==
Borna Lys first appeared in the [[2004]] [[Obsidian Entertainment]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''.<ref name="KOTORII" /> ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', a [[2008]] reference book written by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] and [[Pablo Hidalgo]], confirmed that Lys acquired Lupo Shar's swoop-racing track with the help of Meetra Surik.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
